title: bupleurum mayeri
intro: Bupleurum mayeri, also known as Chinese thunder of heaven, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum mayeri include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism and arthritis, and improving liver function, as well as boosting the immune system and reducing stress. Bupleurum mayeri is often used in herbal preparations such as tea, capsules, and tinctures, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
